steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank comes between a subject (“She”) and a direct object (“them from willow and sedge”). This is the position where the main verb of the sentence must appear.

steps.title: Apply the finite verb rule
steps.content: Choice B, “weaves,” is a finite verb conjugated in third-person singular simple present tense to agree with the subject “She.” The other choices are non-finite forms (gerund and infinitives) that cannot serve as main verbs. That matches choice B — B is correct.
